contact.name: Diane Crawford
contact.notes: Primary ICE and medical proxy. Manages the Bennett Guitar Works Facebook page.

contact.name: Luc Bennett
contact.notes: Welder at Gulf Fabricators, Spring Hill. Married to Ashley. Father of Elise and Beau.

contact.name: Marcel Bennett
contact.notes: Sous chef at Riverside Bistro. Cooks Thanksgiving at the cottage.

contact.name: Ashley Bennett
contact.notes: Married to Luc. Mother of Elise and Beau. Spring Hill.

contact.name: Russ Taylor
contact.notes: Eight seasons on the Lucky Strike. Paid 600 a week in season plus tip pool.

contact.name: Captain Nolan Grant
contact.notes: Runs the Sea Breeze out of Bayport. Hosts the season wind-down dinner.

contact.name: Claire Walsh
contact.notes: Walsh Charter Services. Source of truth on the charter pipeline.

contact.name: Dr. Paul Mitchell
contact.notes: Bayport Family Medicine. Hypertension and knee, quarterly checks.

contact.name: Rick Morgan
contact.notes: Gulf Financial Partners. Manages the traditional IRA.

contact.name: Denise Cooper
contact.notes: Lives in Brooksville. Civil but not warm.

contact.name: Walter Hensley
contact.notes: 1963 Martin D-28 full restoration, work order BGW-1051, delivery October 17, 2026.
